title: Section 20
content: In section 9 of the Delimitation Commission Act, 1952 (81 of 1952), in sub-section (3), for the words "and the orders made under any of the said Acts" the words, brackets and figures "the Himachal Pradesh and Bilaspur (New State) Act, 1954 and the orders made under any of the said Acts" shall be substituted.
